title: Not paying for Ai
text: When I first heard about this game I thought it sounded fun so I decided to get it without checking the reviews. Honestly big mistake because as soon as I opened the app I was met with subscriptions and Ai everything. It’s lazy and doesn’t really make it any better that you have to pay at least 5.99 just to play the game. 0/10

title: Makes you pay for all of the questions.

title: Ai slop
text: The game is just Ai trash. Question are to east to answer and after 9 questions they expect you to pay for everything beyond. It’s understandable if a real person made it, but it’s extremely hard to believe this wasn’t fully made by ai. Also paying for something with advertisement for apps and company’s riddled through emails and apps is so beyond unreasonable to me. There are ads built into the game that they want you to pay for. The little time you are allowed to play for free they advertise thing such as tinder, air bnb, the Simpson, Nike, family guy, and many many more things Some of which you can not answer the questions without interacting with. Over all a complete scam and just unbelievable that they are trying to charge people for it.
